steps.title: Set up the cost
steps.content: The first day costs $360. Each additional day costs $180. For $x$ total days, there are $x-1$ additional days.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: When $x=1$, the equation gives $y=360$, the first-day cost. When $x=2$, it gives $y=540$, which is $360+180$. That confirms A is correct.
